# NekoBeat — The Premium, Cross-Platform Music Aggregator

## About
NekoBeat is a free, open-source music aggregator built with Rust, Tauri v2, React, and GStreamer. It delivers audiophile-grade streaming with under 12ms playback latency and under 150MB memory usage. Available for Windows with macOS, Linux, and Android coming soon.

## Features
- Universal Aggregation: Search YouTube and SoundCloud from one interface
- Offline Caching: Liked songs cached locally for zero-latency playback
- 10-Band DSP Equalizer: GStreamer-powered with genre presets (31Hz–16kHz)
- Smart Discovery: Live Last.fm scraping for trending tracks
- Custom Lyrics: Upload .lrc/.srt/.vtt files with auto-conversion
- Discord Rich Presence: Track info broadcast via Rust integration

## Tech Stack
Rust (core), Tauri v2 (framework), React + TypeScript (frontend), GStreamer (audio), yt-dlp (streams)
